---
title: "SVM Model"
output: html_notebook
---
```{r setup}
library(knitr)
knitr::knit_hooks$set(time_it = local({
 now <- NULL
 function(before, options) {
   if (before) {
     now <<- Sys.time()
   } else {
     res <- difftime(Sys.time(), now, units = "secs")
     paste("Time for this chunk:", round(res, 2), "seconds")
   }
 }
}))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(time_it = TRUE)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/Jim/Documents/Project/STAT-472-Project/Data Frame")

```


```{r}
library(e1071)
library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(doParallel)

```


```{r}
data <- read.csv("filtered_timeseries_fifa_players.csv")
var <- read.csv("variables.csv")

var <- as.character(unlist(var))
df <- data %>% select(all_of(var), 7) %>% na.omit()

```


```{r}
set.seed(123)

train_index <- createDataPartition(df$value_eur, p = 0.6, list = FALSE)
train <- df[train_index, ]
test  <- df[-train_index, ]

```


```{r}
preproc <- preProcess(train, method = c("center", "scale"))

train_scaled <- predict(preproc, train)
test_scaled  <- predict(preproc, test)

```


```{r}
svm_model <- svm(
  value_eur ~ .,
  data = train_scaled,
  type = "eps-regression",
  kernel = "radial"
)

```


```{r}
preds <- predict(svm_model, test_scaled)

```


```{r}
rmse <- sqrt(mean((preds - test_scaled$value_eur)^2))
mae  <- mean(abs(preds - test_scaled$value_eur))

rmse
mae

```


```{r}
ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "cv",
  number = 3,
  search = "random"
)

```


```{r}
# svm_grid <- expand.grid(
#   sigma = c(0.001, 0.01, 0.1),
#   C = c(0.1, 1, 10, 50)
# )

svm_grid <- expand.grid(
  sigma = c(0.01, 0.1),
  C = c(1, 10)
)

```


```{r}
# svm_tuned <- train(
#   value_eur ~ .,
#   data = train_scaled,
#   method = "svmRadial",
#   trControl = ctrl,
#   tuneGrid = svm_grid,
#   metric = "RMSE"
# )

svm_tuned <- train(
  value_eur ~ .,
  data = train_scaled,
  method = "svmRadial",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneLength = 5   # tries 5 random combos
)

```


```{r}
svm_tuned$bestTune

```


```{r}
preds_tuned <- predict(svm_tuned, test_scaled)

```


```{r}
rmse_tuned <- sqrt(mean((preds_tuned - test_scaled$value_eur)^2))
mae_tuned  <- mean(abs(preds_tuned - test_scaled$value_eur))


rmse_tuned
mae_tuned

```


```{r}
plot(svm_tuned)

```
